string.text: Combat thins the Zone faster than the engine refills it. AlifeBalance tracks deaths per origin smart and clears that smart's respawn cooldown once enough of its squads have died. The smart refills from its own configured pool on the engine's next alife tick. It does not spawn anything. Works alongside vanilla, ZCP, Redone, and any other spawner mod.
Master toggle. When off, no death tracking and no nudges.

Place a green PDA map marker on every smart terrain AlifeBalance nudges. The marker lingers for 5 real-time minutes, then clears. Right-click any marker to teleport to that smart. Independent of log level.
Debug and development tools. DEBUG level enables structured tracing of every nudge to alifebalance.log. Has performance cost.
Controls log verbosity. ERROR: crashes only. WARN: anomalies. INFO: config and per-tick summary. DEBUG: every nudge.
Display total deaths, counted deaths (with valid origin smart), scan ticks, and successful nudges via PDA.
Clear all death counters and diagnostic stats. Existing nudges already written to smart-terrain timestamps persist; the engine resolves them on its next try_respawn.
